2026-03-25IRCCImmigration and Refugee Protection ActAppointment of the full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Ottawa District Office)Appointment of Jillan Diana Sadek of Ottawa, Ontario, to be a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Ottawa District Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective May 21, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Ottawa District Office)
precis: Appointment of Jillan Diana Sadek of Ottawa, Ontario, to be a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Ottawa District Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective May 21, 2026.
